name: layer-norm-param-gradient-checks
description: Add numerical gradient checks for layer_norm_backward grad_gamma and grad_beta using central finite differences. Use when: (1) layer_norm_backward returns (grad_input, grad_gamma, grad_beta) but only grad_input is numerically validated, (2) following up after batch_norm gradient checks were added to add the same pattern for layer norm, (3) validating parameter gradients in normalization layers.
